pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_rocket_chat.sh which explicitly seeds the Rocket.Chat environment with a channel named 'release-updates', and export_result.sh which explicitly queries it.
Confirmed via explicit task description and verifier.py logic which checks for this exact string.
Confirmed via explicit task description and verifier.py logic which strictly checks for days == 7.
Confirmed via explicit task description and verifier.py logic which strictly checks for maxUses == 50.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a workspace invite in Rocket.Chat. I verified that the expected target channel ('release-updates') is explicitly created and seeded during environment setup via setup_rocket_chat.sh. The expected text ('Official Beta Program Invite Link'), invite duration (7 days), and max uses (50) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and the strict checking logic within verifier.py.
